notes: Reference platform for text-centric inference. 400 GB/s unified bandwidth, passive cooling.
Mobile UMA reference. Same 400 GB/s peak. Thermal throttle under sustained load.
Strix Halo mini-PC. 215 GB/s peak via LPDDR5x. ROCm/Vulkan ecosystem still maturing.
Discrete RDNA3 mobile. 16GB VRAM hard limit despite high bandwidth. Active high-TDP cooling.
